action.description: The committee on JHA recommend that the measure be PASSED, UNAMENDED. The votes were as follows: 6 Ayes: Representative(s) Tarnas, Poepoe, Belatti, Takayama, Garcia, Shimizu; Ayes with reservations: none;  Noes: none; and 4 Excused: Representative(s) Hashem, Kahaloa, Sayama, Cochran.
